site.title: Chris Lu | Lu Hongcheng
site.description: Lu Hongcheng (Chris Lu), Ph.D. student in Journalism and Communication at Tsinghua University. Research in economic communication, digital culture, gender studies, national image, and media industries.
site.description_zh: 陆泓承（Chris Lu），清华大学新闻与传播学院博士研究生，研究方向包括经济传播、数字文化、性别研究、国家形象与媒介产业。

en.video_fallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.
en.external_media: This item is hosted on an external platform.
en.research_blurb: Focused enough to be legible, broad enough to travel.
en.publications_intro: This page keeps journal articles, conference presentations, and working papers together as a complete record of academic outputs.
en.media_title: Public-facing work across video, broadcast, and live platforms.
en.media_intro: Videos use native browser playback with metadata-only preload to avoid unwanted downloads.
en.data_intro: A growing repository for papers, slides, datasets, codebooks, replication materials, and project attachments.

zh.publications_intro: 本页汇总展示学术论文、会议报告与在研稿件，作为完整成果清单。

profile.name: Chris Lu
profile.title: Ph.D. Student in Journalism and Communication
profile.title_zh: 新闻与传播学博士研究生
profile.affiliation: School of Journalism and Communication, Tsinghua University
profile.affiliation_zh: 清华大学新闻与传播学院
profile.summary: I study how institutions, platforms, and publics negotiate confidence, identity, and power through media. My current work focuses on economic policy communication, national image, gender and sexuality, digital culture, and media industries.
profile.summary_zh: 我的研究关注制度、平台与公众如何通过媒介协商信心、身份与权力。目前的研究方向包括经济政策传播、国家形象、性别与性、数字文化和媒介产业。

themes.name: Economic policy communication
themes.text: News, confidence, market expectations, and the public meaning of policy announcements.
themes.text_zh: 新闻、信心、市场预期，以及政策发布在公共传播中的意义生成。

themes.name: Digital culture and platforms
themes.text: Platform governance, short-form video communities, Tuwei remix culture, and algorithmic media industries.
themes.text_zh: 平台治理、短视频社群、土味二创文化与算法化媒介产业。

themes.name: Gender, sexuality, and media
themes.text: Digital feminist humor, queer heterosexuality, and the cultural negotiation of gender norms.
themes.text_zh: 数字女性主义幽默、酷儿异性恋与性别规范的文化协商。
